## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work?

## Example Usage
```python
# How would a developer use this feature?
from dof import NewFeature

```

## Alternatives Considered
What else was considered and why this approach is better.

Which of DOF's 7 governance layers does this affect?
